Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Person With Disability
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of an Adult with a Disability.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com. (D514).

Robert D. Vale, Esq. appeared with petitioner Sandra Sanchez, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for Francisco Granados, Jr., who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Court Certified Spanish speaking interpreter Mila Magallanes, R.N., assisted Ms. Sanchez at this morning's hearing.
Order appointing Ms. Sanchez Guardian ad Litem for Francisco Granados, Jr. was filed with the Clerk's Office on February 11, 2016.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $250,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $100,000.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $70,706.29.
Costs - $11,249.87.

The net balance of $68,043.84 shall be deposited into a pooled special needs trust account for the benefit of Francisco Granados, Jr., as established through separate order of the Contra Costa Superior Court, as described in Attachment 7c(2)(b) to the Order Approving the Compromise.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of an Adult with a Disability Disputed was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to September 25, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the establishment & funding of the Special Need Trust.
